creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Instead of the previously proposed change, please
consider instead(for when the ports freeze is lifted):

diff -ruN glpk.orig/Makefile glpk/Makefile
--- glpk.orig/Makefile	Thu Aug 30 21:04:11 2007
+++ glpk/Makefile	Sun Nov 18 04:07:13 2007
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # Date created:		16 December 2000
 # Whom:			Dmitry Sivachenko <demon@FreeBSD.org>
 #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/math/glpk/Makefile,v 1.25
2007/08/30 07:45:34 demon Exp $
+# $FreeBSD: ports/math/glpk/Makefile,v 1.24
2007/05/31 11:42:15 demon Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	glpk
-PORTVERSION=	4.21
+PORTVERSION=	4.23
 CATEGORIES=	math
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	glpk
diff -ruN glpk.orig/distinfo glpk/distinfo
--- glpk.orig/distinfo	Thu Aug 30 21:04:11 2007
+++ glpk/distinfo	Sun Nov 18 04:07:13 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (glpk-4.21.tar.gz) =
a41df71415c97fc5c541d19547ced10a
-SHA256 (glpk-4.21.tar.gz) =
3be04106ef18b1f92af9fe7936ecb675a04cabab72ff65e1a03bf2205d99d549
-SIZE (glpk-4.21.tar.gz) = 1413712
+MD5 (glpk-4.23.tar.gz) =
7a232c91ddae5bc38f857a982af87103
+SHA256 (glpk-4.23.tar.gz) =
e22399c3531bc41a99fe97619de66e3ca3c1b81492191e7ee62ba908ebff937f
+SIZE (glpk-4.23.tar.gz) = 1430603
diff -ruN glpk.orig/pkg-plist glpk/pkg-plist
--- glpk.orig/pkg-plist	Thu Aug 30 21:04:11 2007
+++ glpk/pkg-plist	Sun Nov 18 04:07:13 2007
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@
 lib/libglpk.a
 lib/libglpk.la
 lib/libglpk.so
-lib/libglpk.so.6
+lib/libglpk.so.8
